prompt: Insert a new silent panel between panels 2 and 3 showing a close-up of two man in panel two hands touching and saying 'Hello'.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Insert a new comic panel between the existing second panel (the one with the woman and two green figures) and the third panel (the one with Captain Warwick), causing image 1 to expand horizontally. The new panel should be a close-up depicting the hands of the two green-skinned male figures from the existing second panel, shown in the act of touching. This new panel should be visually silent (i.e., contain no narrative captions or thought bubbles), but include a speech bubble or text overlay containing the word 'Hello', emanating from one of the hands.
objects: First original comic panel (with woman and man talking)

Close-up of two green-skinned male hands (in the new panel)
